cfg_file_agents: Instructions for AI coding agents working alongside this agent — scope, responsibilities, build commands, and project conventions.
cfg_file_identity: Core identity and persona — name, role, personality, communication style. Defines how the agent presents itself in every interaction.
cfg_file_soul: Values, principles, and behavioral guidelines — what the agent prioritizes, what it avoids, and how it handles uncertainty or conflict.
cfg_file_user: Context about the user and project — preferences, domain knowledge, goals. Filled in manually or updated by the agent over time.
cfg_file_memory: Long-form narrative memory — what the agent has learned and should recall across sessions. Updated via checkpoints. Max ~3000 chars.
cfg_file_context: Technical project context — stack, architecture, conventions, current state of the codebase. The agent reads this before each session.
cfg_file_skills: Available skills and tools — what the agent can invoke, how to trigger them, which MCP servers or external APIs are connected.
ph_skills: Skills appear once connected to Legion API.
ph_tools: Tools registered by this agent will appear here.
tab_desc_overview: Agent identity, capabilities, and project information at a glance.
tab_desc_chat: Send messages to this agent and receive responses in real time.
tab_desc_workers: Background tasks running in parallel under this agent's supervision.
tab_desc_memories: Persistent facts, temporary notes, and todos the agent carries across sessions.
tab_desc_tasks: Structured work items organised by status across a kanban board.
tab_desc_pipeline: Trigger rules that chain agents together after task completion — build multi-agent workflows.
ph_pipeline: No triggers configured. Add one to chain agents after task completion.
tab_desc_skills: Installed skills and slash commands available to this agent.
tab_desc_tools: External tools, MCP servers, and APIs registered for this agent.
tab_desc_channels: Communication channels through which this agent sends and receives messages.
tab_desc_cron: Scheduled jobs that trigger this agent automatically on a time-based schedule.
tab_desc_config: Model selection and markdown configuration files for this agent.
analyze_meta: AI-powered agent recommendations for this project
analyze_no_model: No default model set. Go to Settings → General and choose a model.
settings_default_model_hint: Used for project analysis and other Legion AI features.
